body: I had that at first, but I then arrested myself with a charge of YAGNI. I couldn't come up with any other use cases except for the healthcheck, so decided to focus on that. The API is a lot more straight forward than something generic.

But I still think we could reuse this. We could inherit the QuietAssets middleware in Propshaft from this and just hardset the path:. But not sure it's even worth it. The implementation is so small here.
In fact, I just made the implementation even slimmer by borrowing from Propshaft's quiet asset middleware. So thanks for the reminder of that one!
I did not. Not sure what happened there. Please do PR to restore!
